headline: Here's Why You Should Retain DexCom Stock in Your Portfolio
summary: DXCM banks on CGM market growth, expanding international demand and strong Q1 momentum, though competitive pressures remain a key risk.

headline: DexCom vs. Insulet: Which Diabetes Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: DexCom posts steady profits and global reach, while Insulet surges ahead with rapid revenue growth and a focused product line. Which strategy stands out?

headline: Dexcom Reaffirms CGM Benefits for All People With Diabetes and Continues Momentum Toward Earlier Stage Intervention and Preventative Care at ADA 2026
summary: SAN DIEGO, June 04, 2026--DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ:DXCM) will present new clinical findings, product advancements and strategic business initiatives reinforcing its commitment to improving care for people with all types of diabetes and ushering in a new era of early stage CGM intervention and preventative care at the American Diabetes Association’s Scientific Sessions in New Orleans, June 5-8, 2026.
